label: reference

card.title: Exponential-backoff retry wrapper with jitter and abort
card.description: A retry() helper for flaky network calls, with full backoff control and AbortSignal support.
card.technicalNotes: No deps. Configurable retries, base delay, factor, max delay, full jitter. Respects AbortSignal. Re-throws last error. Typed. Tested.
isc: Exports retry(fn, opts) that retries a rejecting async fn up to opts.retries times
Applies exponential backoff with full jitter bounded by opts.maxDelay
Aborts immediately and rejects when opts.signal is aborted
Re-throws the final error after exhausting retries
Tests cover success-after-retry, exhaustion, and abort paths
